### Description of Changes

Please provide a short summary of what this PR does and why.

- What problem does it solve?
- What parts of the codebase are affected (analysis, ML, dashboard, DevOps, etc.)?

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes a bug)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] Documentation / meta (docs, CI, tooling, etc.)

### Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest`)
- [ ] Lint and format checks pass (`ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs, or inline docstrings as needed)
- [ ] Any new configuration, environment variables, or migrations are documented

### Screenshots / Demo (Optional)

If this PR changes the UI or user-facing behavior, add screenshots, GIFs, or short notes here.
